name: Midnight Recovery Serum
description: A potent overnight serum that visibly restores skin's radiance and reduces the appearance of fine lines while you sleep.
ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Niacinamide, Squalane, Rosehip Oil, Vitamin E, Hyaluronic Acid.

name: Velvet Matte Lipstick
description: A long-wearing, high-pigment lipstick with a smooth matte finish that stays comfortable all day.
ingredients: Isododecane, Dimethicone, Trimethylsiloxysilicate, Polyethylene, Disteardimonium Hectorite.

name: Hydra-Glow Daily Moisturizer
description: Lightweight, oil-free moisturizer that provides 24-hour hydration and a natural, healthy glow.
ingredients: Aqua, Aloe Vera, Green Tea Extract, Hyaluronic Acid, Panthenol.

name: Silk Protein Hair Mask
description: Deeply nourishing hair mask that repairs damage and adds incredible shine and softness.
ingredients: Hydrolyzed Silk Protein, Argan Oil, Shea Butter, Keratin.

name: Radiant Foundation SPF 30
description: A medium-coverage foundation that evens out skin tone and provides a luminous, dewy finish with sun protection.
ingredients: Titanium Dioxide, Zinc Oxide, Glycerin, Vitamin C, Mica.

name: Vitamin C Brightening Cleanser
description: Gentle foaming cleanser that removes impurities and brightens the complexion with pure Vitamin C.
ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Lauroyl Sarcosinate, Ascorbic Acid, Citrus Extract.
